author: RamSet
releaseNotes: 0.9.0 - Controls an ecobee 100% locally over the HomeKit Accessory Protocol (HAP) — no cloud, no Apple hardware, no bridge. HomeKit event push is now the DEFAULT (auto-starts when paired; instant updates; 5-min keepalive + auto-reconnect; reads/writes route over the live session). In-driver pairing (enter IP + setup code, Save to pair) with automatic port discovery. Leaner command set: Set Desired Temperature, Raise/Lower Setpoint, Resume Program + standard thermostat controls. Remote room sensors are exposed as child devices.
tags: Thermostat, ecobee, HomeKit, HAP, Local, Sensor

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Thermostat
drivers.description: Local controller for an ecobee thermostat over the HomeKit Accessory Protocol (HAP): mode, setpoints, temperature, humidity, operating state, and fan.

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Remote Sensor
drivers.description: Child device for ecobee remote sensors (temperature, occupancy, motion, battery). Created automatically by the thermostat driver.
